import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  let n = tokens.len()
  if n == 0
    Err("no input")
  else
    mut i = 0
    mut max_val = 0
    mut min_val = 0
    mut first = true
    while i < n
      let tok = match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        t
      when None
        ""
      end
      let parsed = string.parse_int(tok)
      let v = match parsed
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if first
        max_val = v
        min_val = v
        first = false
      else
        if v > max_val
          max_val = v
        end
        if v < min_val
          min_val = v
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("max=#{max_val}")
    println("min=#{min_val}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
